research_question: After both new round7 keepers failed to pass clean composability screening versus the frozen v18 core family, which more session-structure and microstructure-oriented atomic price-volume signals can expand the retained keeper pool without simply remixing existing momentum, liquidity-trend, amount-shock, or price-volume-confirmation mechanisms?

discovery_contract.builder_rule: each candidate builder may rank exactly one raw signal field and may not combine multiple raw signals inside the same candidate
discovery_contract.source_inspiration_rule: candidate definitions may draw inspiration from Alpha158-style atomic expressions and common price-volume paper mechanisms, but every field must be implemented independently inside this project and must not rely on the neighboring qlib adapter stack

signal_pool.interpretation: stronger average overnight contribution to total return may capture a session-allocation mechanism distinct from open-to-close trend bias

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This isolates close-to-next-open return contribution, which is orthogonal to the already-tested open-to-close drift mechanism.

signal_pool.interpretation: a smaller overnight-minus-intraday return spread may capture smoother session transmission rather than concentrated gap-driven moves

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This measures the balance between overnight and intraday legs rather than the sign or strength of intraday drift alone.

signal_pool.interpretation: a higher recent rate of gap filling may capture price-resilience and auction overshoot correction distinct from simple gap frequency

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This focuses on whether gaps get absorbed intraday rather than how often gaps occur.

signal_pool.interpretation: stronger lower-shadow support may capture intraday buy-the-dip absorption distinct from broad downside recovery averages

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This isolates wick-based support behavior inside each bar rather than average recovery conditional on weak sessions.

signal_pool.interpretation: a higher upside-versus-downside intraday range balance may capture directional pressure asymmetry distinct from upside_range_share

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This compares directional range asymmetry within bars, not the share of total range contributed by up days across the window.

signal_pool.interpretation: a lower turnover concentration on down days may capture pressure imbalance distinct from signed amount or turnover acceleration

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This measures down-day versus up-day turnover allocation, not the short-vs-medium change in total turnover level.

signal_pool.interpretation: a higher share of days that open strong and hold strength may capture opening-auction quality distinct from close-based confirmation signals

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This emphasizes opening strength persistence rather than where the bar closes relative to the day's range.

signal_pool.interpretation: a lower downside semivolatility share may encode asymmetric risk quality beyond simple total volatility or tail pressure

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This normalizes downside volatility relative to total volatility instead of measuring absolute downside tail magnitude.

signal_pool.interpretation: stronger next-session recovery after down days with supportive volume may capture a resilience mechanism distinct from generic price-volume synchronicity

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This is explicitly a conditional follow-up recovery mechanism after down days, not a same-day price-volume co-movement measure.

signal_pool.interpretation: more efficient translation of intraday range into directional close location may capture cleaner session trend structure than raw range or close-location alone

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This measures how efficiently intraday range turns into net directional progress rather than the average sign of open-to-close drift.

discovery_contract.aggregation_rule: none; this round explicitly forbids combining signals
discovery_contract.missing_data_rule: score nulls are allowed and must be preserved for audit; no imputation or cross-signal fallback is allowed

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, same TopK=10 width, and same v18 top-15 refresh hysteresis
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same v18 refreshed-portfolio implementation until any later family round explicitly changes it

promotion_rule.phase_gate: Only atomic signals that show directionally coherent positive edge in signal-edge diagnostics may advance into a later composability-screening round.
promotion_rule.non_promotion_rule: Signals whose top slice remains weaker than rank11_20, or that only restate an existing canonical mechanism under a new session label, should be rejected rather than rescued by later overlay or family tweaks.

disallowed_changes: Do not mix multiple raw signals into one candidate inside this round.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change the frozen v18 refresh hysteresis rule.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not add extraction, weight-penalty, turnover-suppression, stability-cap, overlay, or family-composition changes inside this round.
Do not import or depend on the neighboring qlib data adapter layer; this project must implement all candidate fields independently on its own data contracts.
Do not open budget for candidates that are already covered by the canonical alias map unless a new override_reason is explicitly approved.
notes: This round is opened after both round7 positive keepers returned composability_screen_mixed rather than cleanly promotable interaction with the frozen v18 core family.
The objective is to search for more session-structure and microstructure-oriented alpha mechanisms rather than repeating trend, liquidity-improvement, or confirmation clusters.
